title: Low Fire, Shield & More
description: Low Fire, Shield, Grass & More, Less obstruction for your game screens
body:
![effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WijopzGe/images/a7276d82afeb349a162b8178addab5f0f05e51eb.gif)

This texture pack is as simple as its name! Its features include:
- Low fire, low shields, smaller undead totems, no pumpkin blur, shorter grass, no freeze effect overlay
- No OPTIFINE needed! When you are on fire, the flames won't cover the whole screen, only a small part of it



<details>
<summary>中文</summary>
  
这个材质包就跟他的名字一样简单！他的功能有：
- 低火，低盾，更小的不死图腾，无南瓜模糊，更矮的草，无冰冻效果遮挡
- 无需 OPTIFINE！当您着火时，火焰不会覆盖整个屏幕，而只会覆盖屏幕的一小部分


</details>

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c55f85f63227a9f7df26bc6d61146d3c252f016.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c99c318345f1ed7224967f173fd86f50e1d131e2.png)
